texto: Some people were destined to have a significant other.Some people were destined for greatness.But few others were destined to be soldiers, to be warriors, to be alone.That is me.It is not a path that i have chosen, but it is a path that i must walk.Some may think this is sad, but i have come to peace with it.Because i am and always will be a soldier, a warrior...Alone.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Chris Söderström sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Some people were destined to have a significant other.Some people were destined for greatness.But…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, philosophical, poetic, útil em momentos de poetic.
